LanguageData.ABY_CircleEmberHoundLetterDesc: The circle begins opening ember portals across the map. Hunter-constructs are coming through in staggered waves, and some breaches also spill bonus rift imps.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_EmberHound_Desc: Consumes one ember hound sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and then opens a staggered cascade of ember portals across the map. Each colonist adds one ember portal that releases one hound 75% of the time or two hounds 25% of the time, and every colonist also has a 20% chance to add a separate imp portal carrying two to four rift imps. Portals are opened away from the colony base.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_EmberHound_Rewards: • Portal-driven mid-loop pressure test • Stronger flanker identity before the first true boss • Extra residue and occasional imp overflow when the colony survives the cascade
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_EmberHound_SideEffects: • Opens portals sequentially across the map instead of dropping the pack in one place • Each colonist adds one ember portal with a 75% chance for one hound and a 25% chance for two • Every colonist also has a 20% chance to add a separate imp portal carrying two to four rift imps
